title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Licious - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Licious - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Licious! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Licious:
Licious is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Licious!
